title: Fry Skibidi
description: Enjoy this Halloween season with this amazing puzzle horror game featuring the character of the moment Skibidi Toilet! Fry Skibidi is the coolest physics-based puzzle game. Drop the Skibidi down onto a metal block by destroying all the other blocks. Once all the blocks are gone and the Skibidi is on a metal block press the ZAPPER button to fry Skibidi! explore all three worlds and clear all the puzzles.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play The main goal is to land the Skibidi on the metal block and once all blocks are destroyed press the zapper button to fry the Skibidi
